description_long: This is a small, rectangular orange juice carton labeled 'EASY MOUZUO' with a vibrant orange-to-white gradient background. The front and side panels feature a vivid illustration of an orange resting on a striped beach chair, evoking a refreshing and summery feel. The packaging displays both English and French text, indicating the product as 'Orange drink' and 'boisson d'orange', with a volume of 200 ml. The sides of the carton include detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and a barcode. The top of the carton is sealed, with a small circular area suggesting a straw insertion point. The overall design is clean, colorful, and visually appealing, making it easily recognizable as a juice box.
description: A vibrant orange juice carton labeled 'EASY MOUZUO' with an orange-on-beach-chair illustration and bilingual text. The box is compact, colorful, and features nutritional information on the sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'EASY MOUZUO' brand, orange drink label, and a large illustration of an orange on a beach chair.
description_view_1: This side view displays detailed product information, ingredients, and a barcode, with text in multiple languages.
description_view_2: The opposite front view features the same orange and beach chair illustration, but with French labeling ('boisson d'orange').
description_view_3: This side view highlights the nutritional facts panel and recycling information, with clear black text on a white background.
